A large stand of wild grape and muscadine vines can be found here.
There are several pecan trees along the road and in the vacant field here. Access: Public.
A large stand of pokeweed is along the road in the vacant lot. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: March-June.
There are several American persimmon trees along the side of Dexter Lane here.

Large elderberry plants around the radio tower at the SW corner of Walnut Grove and Farm road.  Wear long pants, because there are some brambles mixed in.  Plants are tall, so some climbing and long cutters may be helpful. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season:
Multiple peach trees, elder flower and bramble berries.
